heading: Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund
label: 1486 Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund
text: The Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund shall be available to the Secretary for actions taken under sections 1474 and 1476 of this title.
notes: Amendments1990— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The revolving fund established under shall be available to the Secretary for Federal actions and activities under .”Pub. L. 101–380section 1321(k) of this titlesection 1474 of this title

Effective Date of 1990 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to incidents occurring after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 101–380section 1020 of Pub. L. 101–380section 2701 of this titleAug. 18, 1990
